title: Add GFEntryId and TeamAdminUserId to Webhook 0001
description:
Add two new attributes to the Zapier webhook 0001 (Create User) payload to distinguish between the two user creation paths:

1. **GFEntryId** — populated when the user entered via the web-to-lead Gravity Form signup
2. **TeamAdminUserID** — populated when the user was invited by an existing tenant admin (uses the public userId, not the auto-increment INT)

In any given event, one of these values should be populated and the other should be null, identifying which path the user took to enter the system.
acceptance_criteria: Webhook 0001 payload includes GFEntryId for Gravity Form users
Webhook 0001 payload includes TeamAdminUserID for invited users
TeamAdminUserID uses the public userId format
One field is populated and the other is null for each event
Changes deployed to both staging and production
middleware_changes: Webhook 0001 payload extended with GFEntryId (from DTPSignup record) and TeamAdminUserID (public userId of the inviting admin). Logic determines which path the user took and populates the appropriate field.
implementation_notes: Also implements MBT-463 (adding GFEntryId). Deployed to staging and production. Tested and verified by product owner.
comment_summary: Developer deployed to staging and production. Product owner tested and verified both attributes are correctly populated.
